title: Creation Exploring the Road of
description: This is a mechanical power integration package
body:
Creation: Exploring the Path of Technological Innovation: The Wondrous Fusion of Mechanical Industry and Rural Life This is a "My World" module pack that focuses on mechanical power and technology.
It organically combines various themes such as machinery, industry, technology, and leisure agriculture, creating a unique gaming experience. Core Function: Mechanical Power and Technology: With the help of related modules, players can experience the roar of machines and the rotation of gears, from simple conveyors to complex automated production lines, build an efficient industrial empire, optimize resource allocation, provide phased goals and directions for players, help explore the gameplay of the module, gradually unlock achievements, and deepen the gaming journey. 
Copyright and License Statement: This integrated package (including all historical versions) is subject to the "Creative Commons Attribution-NoDerivs 4.0 International" (CC BY-ND 4.0) license.
